text: Adoption increased, compared to last quarter.
The adoption rate is higher than last quarter.
Churn is lower than our target.
This dashboard is more efficient than the old one.
Thanks for joining, David. Overall, your health score is seventy-eight, which is higher than last quarter.
That is good to hear. Which metric improved the most since our last review?
Adoption. Your adoption rate increased to seventy-four percent, well above the target of seventy.
Excellent. And what about churn? My board always asks about that.
Churn decreased again, so it is now lower than last quarter. Retention is strong too.
Is there anything that went the wrong way?
Yes. Support tickets rose significantly last month, so we will run a walkthrough and track the trend weekly.

Hi Patricia, this is Raj from the data team, sending you a quick voice note before the quarterly review with David. I just finished the customer health report, so let me walk you through the headline numbers. The overall health score is seventy-eight, which is higher than last quarter's seventy-two, so the trend is clearly positive. Adoption is the big win. The adoption rate increased from sixty percent to seventy-four percent, well above our target of seventy. Retention also looks strong, and churn decreased again, so we are now below the target for the third quarter in a row. There is one area to watch, though. Support tickets rose quite a lot last month, a significant rise, not a slight one, and daily logins in the finance team dropped a little. My read is that the new feature confused a few users, so I would be honest about that in the review and show the plan to fix it. Compared to where we were a year ago, this account is in much better shape. Good luck with David, and call me if you want to change any of the slides.

Hi Patricia, this is Karen, the executive sponsor on our side, leaving you a short message after today's review. I really appreciated how clear the health report was. For the first time, I could actually see the trend, instead of just a wall of numbers. My team was very happy to hear that our adoption rate is higher than the target and that churn is lower than last quarter. Those two metrics matter the most to my leadership. I was also glad that you were honest about the support tickets. The rise looked big on the slide, but your explanation made sense, and the plan to fix it gave me confidence. One small request for next time. Could you add a simple line that compares each metric to our original target, so I can share it with my boss in one screenshot? Other than that, this was the most useful review we have had. The numbers are moving in the right direction, and your story around them was easy to follow. Thank you, and let us keep this format for the next quarter.
The adoption rate is higher than last quarter.
Churn is lower than our target.
This dashboard is more efficient than the old report.
Support tickets increased a lot last month.
There was a significant rise in support tickets.
The health score is higher than last quarter.
The adoption rate increased to seventy-four percent.
